title: Capital-Lowercase speed mix
description: Real text with names and sentence starts — Shift drill at speed
text: Sarah and David met James at the New York office. Lisa from Boston joined later. They discussed Q3 plans, the European launch, and the partnership with Tokyo. Maria took notes. Friday wrap-up.

tips.text: Shift before letter, not after — practice the timing
Names and Q-numbers are everywhere in business writing

tips.target: Sarah and David met James at the New York office. Lisa from Boston joined later. They

tips.text: If Shift breaks your rhythm, drill capitals 5 times in a row

tips.target: discussed Q3 plans, the European launch, and the partnership with Tokyo. Maria took notes. Friday wrap-up.

character_tips.anna: Shift timing is what separates 40 WPM from 60 WPM. Smooth shift = smooth speed.
character_tips.maxim: Business writing is half names. Master capital letters at speed.
character_tips.knopych: Caps lock OFF — Shift like a PRO! 🎯
character_tips.klavochka: Pinky press, finger tap, my dear — gentle but firm 🌸
